nasb.text: The girl was very beautiful; and she became the king’s nurse and served him, but the king did not cohabit with her.

esv.text: The young woman was very beautiful, and she was of service to the king and attended to him, but the king knew her not.

cnv.text: 這少女極其美麗。她照顧王，服事他，可是王沒有與她發生過關係。

ccb.text: 这女子长得花容月貌，她照顾、伺候王，但王没有与她同房。
